title: Assign Pod-level CPU and memory resources — Limitations
text:
For Kubernetes 1.36, pod-level resources have the
following limitations:
Resource Types:
Only CPU, memory and hugepages resources can be specified at pod-level.
Operating System:
Pod-level resources are not supported for Windows
pods.
Resource Managers:
The Topology Manager, Memory Manager and CPU Manager
support pod-level resources when the
PodLevelResourceManagers
feature gate
is enabled. See
Pod-level resource managers
for more details. Without this feature gate enabled, they do not align pods
and containers based on pod-level resources.
In-Place Resize:
In-place resize
of pod-level resources requires the
InPlacePodLevelResourcesVerticalScaling
feature gate,
which is alpha in Kubernetes 1.36. For more details, see
Resize Pod CPU and Memory Resources
.
